# Repository instructions

- Preserve behavior and data-safety boundaries when refactoring.
- Never add real phone numbers, messages, contacts, addresses, location data, recordings, credentials, or signing material.
- Use the reserved fictional number `202-555-0100` in examples.
- Run `npm run check` after TypeScript changes.
- Run the Android compile check after native or dependency changes.
- Document permission, privacy, external-service, and emergency-flow changes.
- Prefer focused modules, but do not split code solely to meet an arbitrary line limit.
